NAME: National Genomics Data Center
NAME_ZH: 国家基因组科学数据中心
DESCRIPTION: Operated by [CNCB (China National Center for Bioinformation)](https://www.cncb.ac.cn/). The NGDC provides open-access data and services for life and health sciences—supporting translation of large-scale data into discoveries for academia and industry. The site describes the center as **National Genomics Data Center (formerly the BIG Data Center)** and highlights national-scale infrastructure (multi-petabyte storage, high-throughput compute, and wide network capacity). Flagship sequence services center on **GSA** (Genome Sequence Archive) and [Genome Warehouse (GWH)](https://ngdc.cncb.ac.cn/gwh/); other prominent portals include GenBase (genetic sequences), GVM (Genome Variation Map), **OMIX** (miscellaneous multi-omics), BioProject and BioSample libraries, **GSA-Human** (human omics with controlled access), MethBank, GEN (Gene Expression Nebulas), Database Commons (biological database catalog), BioCode, BIT (Bioinformatics Toolkit), OpenLB, and BIG Search (cross-domain search). The English hub also groups **partner** access to EBI- and NCBI-family databases alongside NGDC-hosted resources.

KEY_DATABASES.NAME: GSA
KEY_DATABASES.DESCRIPTION: **Genome Sequence Archive**—repository for raw sequencing reads, assemblies, and study metadata at NGDC, in the same role as [SRA](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/sra/) / [ENA](https://www.ebi.ac.uk/ena) within the INSDC ecosystem.

KEY_DATABASES.NAME: GSA-Human
KEY_DATABASES.DESCRIPTION: Human-focused omics archive with **controlled access** and policy-driven release, analogous in purpose to controlled human read archives elsewhere.

KEY_DATABASES.NAME: OMIX
KEY_DATABASES.DESCRIPTION: Multi-omics submission and browse portal for datasets that do not fit a single “sequence-only” archive—metadata-rich miscellaneous omics at NGDC.
